channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Some of the skydivers killed in Missouri plane crash were experienced jumpers
item.description: Several of the skydivers who were killed when their plane crashed moments after taking off from a Missouri airfield were experienced jumpers.

item.title: California Gov. Gavin Newsom says Trump’s Justice Department is investigating him and his wife
Utah canyon BASE jump kills 2, including extreme athlete who performed with Madonna
